YatesCharacterFull NameAlbert Julian YatesNicknamesA.J.StatusDeceasedManner of DeathMurderedCircumstancesImpaled with a curtain rod byDexter MorganCharacteristicsAgeMid-30s (at death)GenderMaleEyesBrownHairBlackPersonal StatusMarital StatusSingleImmediate RelativesMr. YatesMrs. YatesProfessional StatusProfessionCable TechnicianSerial KillerAffiliationSolray CommunicationsSeries InfoSeason(s)Season EightFirst AppearanceScar TissueLast AppearanceThis Little PiggyAppears inTwo EpisodesPortrayed ByAaron McCuskerKiller Profile"No Known Moniker"InactiveNumber of VictimsAt least 6Modus OperandiTools/WeaponsTaser (self-defense)Pliers (to break toes)Knife (to deliver the final blow)Killing MethodImprisons women for days, breaks each individual toe before stabbing them in the chest and burying their bodyMethod of DisposalBuries victims in his back yard, planting rose bushes over the plotsCauseHis mother frequently beat him when he was younger. He found a safe place under his bed, where he could only see his mother's shoes going back and forth as she looked for him.

characters.name: Aaron Spencer
characters.description: Aaron Spencer:Captain of Miami Metro Homicide and Masked Kidnapper Aaron Spencer19911973CharacterFull NameAaron SpencerNicknamesMcScary(by actorReno Wilson; reference to popular Dempsey role McDreamy onGrey's Anatomy)Child Killer(byDexter)Kidnapper(by Miami Metro and other characters, including Spencer himself)StatusDeceasedManner of DeathHomicideCircumstancesPartially decapitated byDexter Morgan, bled out within seconds.CharacteristicsAge40s(at death)GenderMaleEyesGreenHairBlack(Graying)EthnicityCaucasianPersonal StatusMarital StatusDivorcedSpouseBecca Spencer(ex-wife)Immediate RelativesNicky Spencer(legal son)Professional StatusProfessionMiami Metro Homicide Captain(1980s – 1991)Lieutenant of Miami Metro Vice(1970s – 1980s)KidnapperMurdererSeries InfoSeason(s)Dexter: Original SinFirst Appearance'And in the Beginning...'Last Appearance'Code Blues'Appears inTen EpisodesPortrayed ByPatrick DempseyKiller Profile"Masked Kidnapper"InactiveNumber of Victims2(directly)4(indirectly)4(attempted)Modus OperandiTools/WeaponsIce pick, Handgun, Flare gun, PipeKilling MethodCaptured victim and held in captivity for 12 days. On the fourth day he would cut off a finger, on the 12th day he would track them down and kill them with an ice pick in the back of the skull(Jimmy Powell)Arranged to plant evidence in Cartel safehouse and escalated conflict - forcing a firefight when one of the gang members shot first. Five cartel members were killed in the firefight, Bobby Watt was badly wounded by a gunshot to his neck.Attempted to burn victim with flare gun and beat with metal pipe (Dexter Morgan)Attempted to down victim (Nicky Spencer)Knocked out victim and thrown down stairs, likely intended to kill later but was stopped (Nelson)Method of DisposalStrung from a overpass bridge(Jimmy)Left where killed (cartel members)CauseAngered towards his wife's infidelity and the reality that Nicky was not his son - Aaron snapped, his rage resulting in a twisted plan to hurt and ultimately kill her along with Nicky. He chose to kidnap the son of Judge Howell, both practicing for when he would eventually kidnap Nicky and to create the illusion that this was a Cartel move. He then would have blamed the Cartels as a cover story, choosing an up and coming organization known as the Los Tigres Cartel as the target of the police manhunt while he reveled in his wife's torment all the while pretending to be the concerned father. It's unknown if he had motivations beyond this, possibly using it as a political move on the side but first and foremost his instincts were to kill both Nicky and Becca.Captain Aaron Spenceris a character and theMain Antagonistof theShowtimeseriesDexter: Original Sin.

On the fourth day he would cut off a finger, on the 12th day he would track them down and kill them with an ice pick in the back of the skull(Jimmy Powell)Arranged to plant evidence in Cartel safehouse and escalated conflict - forcing a firefight when one of the gang members shot first. Five cartel members were killed in the firefight, Bobby Watt was badly wounded by a gunshot to his neck.Attempted to burn victim with flare gun and beat with metal pipe (Dexter Morgan)Attempted to down victim (Nicky Spencer)Knocked out victim and thrown down stairs, likely intended to kill later but was stopped (Nelson)Method of DisposalStrung from a overpass bridge(Jimmy)Left where killed (cartel members)CauseAngered towards his wife's infidelity and the reality that Nicky was not his son - Aaron snapped, his rage resulting in a twisted plan to hurt and ultimately kill her along with Nicky. He chose to kidnap the son of Judge Howell, both practicing for when he would eventually kidnap Nicky and to create the illusion that this was a Cartel move. He then would have blamed the Cartels as a cover story, choosing an up and coming organization known as the Los Tigres Cartel as the target of the police manhunt while he reveled in his wife's torment all the while pretending to be the concerned father. It's unknown if he had motivations beyond this, possibly using it as a political move on the side but first and foremost his instincts were to kill both Nicky and Becca.Captain Aaron Spenceris a character and theMain Antagonistof theShowtimeseriesDexter: Original Sin.

characters.name: Al Walker
characters.description: Al Walker:Rapunzel - The Ponytail Guy Al WalkerCharacterFull NameAlbert WalkerAliasesRapunzelAl JollyNicknamesAlStatusAliveCharacteristicsAge53Birthday5 September 1972GenderMaleEyesBrownHairLight brownPersonal StatusMarital StatusMarriedSpouseBonnie WalkerImmediate RelativesUnnamed mother (status unknown)Two unnamed daughters (eldest children)One unnamed son (third child)Mabel Walker(youngest child)AddressWisconsinProfessional StatusProfessionSalesmanSeries InfoSeason(s)Dexter: ResurrectionFirst Appearance'Call Me Red'Last AppearanceThe Kill Room Where It HappensAppears inFour EpisodesPortrayed ByEric StonestreetKiller Profile"Rapunzel"ActiveNumber of VictimsAt least 19Modus OperandiTools/WeaponsHis handsKilling MethodStrangles women and cuts of their ponytail after pretending to get hurt on bike and hiking pathsMethod of DisposalUnknownCauseThough not confirmed, due to the fact that his victims are all women who resemble his mother who is heavily implied to have been abusive towards him, his killings may very well be some kind of coping mechanism to deal with the trauma his mother inflicted upon him.Albert "Al" Walker(also known asAl Jolly[1]and nicknamedRapunzel) is a character in theShowtimeseriesDexter: Resurrection.[2]He is a serial killer who kills female victims and cuts off their ponytails for his collection. His need to kill is called "The Need". He was amongPrater's Serial Killers, a group of loyal serial killers that were bankrolled by the billionaire venture capitalistLeon Praterand served as one of the Central Antagonists of Season 1. FollowingGareth's death, he is the only surviving member of the group outside of its apex predatorDexter Morgan.

characters.description: Alan Elsonis a character inSeason TwoofShowtime's seriesDEXTER. Alan is one ofDexter Morgan's many victims and is confirmed during theBay Harbor Butcher Caseby the blood slide samples (recorded via a report[1]) taken from Dexter's 46 blood slides. Alan is one of these 46. Alan's mugshot is also seen during the slide show, right next toAlan Matherson's photo.

characters.name: Alex Timmons
characters.description: Alex TimmonsCharacterFull NameAlexander TimmonsStatusDeceasedManner of DeathHomicideCircumstancesStabbed in the chest byDexter MorganCharacteristicsAge35 (October 2003)Birthdayc. 1968GenderMaleEyesBrownHairBlackPersonal StatusMarital StatusDivorcedSpouseUnnamed ex-wifeImmediate RelativesUnnamed fatherProfessional StatusProfessionU.S. Marine Sniper (discharged)Series InfoSeason(s)Season OneFirst AppearanceReturn to SenderLast AppearanceAlex Timmons (Early Cuts)Appears inOne Episode (TV series)Portrayed ByDemetrius Grosse(TV series)Shawn Shultz(Early Cuts)Killer Profile"No Known Moniker"InactiveNumber of Victims4 (3 in Early Cuts)Modus OperandiTools/WeaponsSniper riflesHandgunsKilling MethodSnipingMethod of DisposalNoneCauseIn Early Cuts, Alex developed an obsession with killing during his younger years, and later used his profession as a sniper to his advantage. His motivation for killing in theShowtimeseries is unknown.Alex Timmonsis a character inSeason Oneof theShowtimeseriesDEXTER,as well as inDexter Early Cuts. He was a Marine sniper, and one ofDexter Morgan's earlier kills.  When Dexter sliced his cheek, it inspired him to collect blood slides as trophies, with Alex being the first. Alex began to murder civilians after he was discharged from the Marines. Back in the States, he targeted innocent people, killing four victims with gunshots. However, this is not shown and only mentioned on a now defunct website.
